findings.evidence: Lines 248-257 construct an equality of the exact function passed to `Finsupp.lsum`; `Complex.lean` already exposes `fullyBlockedDifferential_single` at lines 86-88 and `fullyBlockedDifferential_single_apply` at lines 97-99.
findings.fix: Prove equality extensionally using the existing public simp lemmas, e.g. compare values on `Finsupp.single x 1` via `fullyBlockedDifferential_single` and `fullyBlockedDifferentialOnGenerator_swapMarkings`, or add a reusable extensional lemma for `GridChain` linear maps and use it here.
findings.issue: `fullyBlockedDifferential_swapMarkings` proves linear-map equality by spelling out the `Finsupp.lsum`/`smulRight` implementation and then unfolding `fullyBlockedDifferential`.

summary: One proof relies on the private implementation shape of the differential instead of the public generator lemmas, making it brittle under harmless refactors.
